title: Extract A2A protocol into standalone crate (crates/zeroclaw-a2a)
description: Refactor A2A implementation from inline src/channels/a2a/ and src/gateway/a2a.rs into a standalone crate at crates/zeroclaw-a2a/ to minimize merge conflicts with main branch. The crate owns protocol types, channel impl, pairing, gateway handlers, and config types. Main crate becomes a thin adapter with ~5-line hooks in channels/mod.rs, gateway/mod.rs, and config re-exports.

title: Scaffold crates/zeroclaw-a2a crate with Cargo.toml and module structure
description: Create crates/zeroclaw-a2a/ with Cargo.toml (deps: serde, schemars, async-trait, reqwest, axum, tokio, chrono, uuid, sha2, rand, hex, parking_lot, tokio-stream, futures-util, anyhow, tracing). Module structure: src/lib.rs, src/protocol.rs, src/channel.rs, src/pairing.rs, src/gateway.rs, src/config.rs. Define abstraction traits: AgentDispatcher (for run_gateway_chat_with_tools), SecretStore (for pairing token encryption), HttpClientBuilder (for proxy-aware client construction).

title: Move protocol types to crates/zeroclaw-a2a/src/protocol.rs
description: Move src/channels/a2a/protocol.rs to crates/zeroclaw-a2a/src/protocol.rs. This file has zero crate:: dependencies — it only uses serde, schemars, and std. Also move the duplicate A2AConfig/A2APeerConfig/A2ARateLimitConfig/A2AIdempotencyConfig/A2AReconnectConfig/AgentCardConfig/SkillConfig types from src/config/schema.rs into the crate's src/config.rs module. The main crate schema.rs will re-export or map from the crate types.

title: Move channel implementation to crates/zeroclaw-a2a/src/channel.rs
description: Move src/channels/a2a/channel.rs to crates/zeroclaw-a2a/src/channel.rs. Replace crate::channels::traits::{Channel, ChannelMessage, SendMessage} with the crate's own re-exported Channel trait (or a local copy since it's small ~80 lines). Replace crate::config::build_runtime_proxy_client_with_timeouts with a constructor that accepts a reqwest::Client or uses a simple default builder. All tests move with the code.

title: Move pairing logic to crates/zeroclaw-a2a/src/pairing.rs
description: Move src/channels/a2a/pairing.rs to crates/zeroclaw-a2a/src/pairing.rs. Abstract crate::security::secrets::SecretStore into a trait defined in the crate (trait SecretEncryptor { fn encrypt/decrypt }). The main crate implements this trait by delegating to its SecretStore. All pairing tests move with the code.

title: Move gateway handlers to crates/zeroclaw-a2a/src/gateway.rs
description: Move src/gateway/a2a.rs to crates/zeroclaw-a2a/src/gateway.rs. Define an AgentDispatcher trait: async fn dispatch(message: &str) -> Result<String>. The gateway handlers accept a generic state that provides config + task_store + dispatcher. The main crate implements AgentDispatcher by calling run_gateway_chat_with_tools. Export a function build_a2a_routes() -> Router<S> that the main gateway mounts. TaskStore and TaskEntry stay in this module.

title: Wire main crate to depend on zeroclaw-a2a crate
description: Update main Cargo.toml to add zeroclaw-a2a = { path = 'crates/zeroclaw-a2a' } dependency. Replace src/channels/a2a/ module with thin re-exports from the crate. Update src/channels/mod.rs factory to use crate types. Update src/gateway/mod.rs to mount routes from zeroclaw_a2a::gateway::build_a2a_routes(). Replace A2A config types in src/config/schema.rs with re-exports from the crate. Implement AgentDispatcher trait for AppState. Update src/lib.rs and src/main.rs command references.

title: Move integration tests and verify all A2A tests pass
description: Move tests/a2a_google_protocol.rs to crates/zeroclaw-a2a/tests/. Verify all 84 unit tests and 9 integration tests pass. Run cargo test -p zeroclaw-a2a and cargo test --lib -- a2a in the main crate. Verify cargo check/clippy/fmt pass for both crates.

title: Implement Google A2A task streaming in listen() method
description: The listen() method in src/channels/a2a/channel.rs is currently stubbed. Need to implement proper task streaming that connects to /tasks/{id}/stream endpoints for active tasks and processes TaskUpdate messages via SSE.

title: A2A Protocol: Phase 2 - Security & Reliability
description: Security hardening and reliability improvements for A2A protocol

title: Task 7: Peer Authentication & Pairing
description: Implement pairing flow with CLI command. Effort: 2h

title: Task 8: Rate Limiting & Idempotency
description: Add rate limiting and idempotency checks for A2A endpoints. Effort: 1h

title: Task 9: Connection Resilience
description: Implement exponential backoff and reconnection logic for SSE streams. Effort: 2h

title: A2A Protocol: Phase 1 - Core Implementation
description: Implement HTTP/2 + SSE based agent-to-agent communication protocol. This is the parent epic for all A2A implementation tasks.

title: Task 1: A2A Message Types & Protocol
description: Create protocol.rs with A2AMessage and A2APeer structs. Includes serialization tests. Effort: 2h

title: Task 2: A2A Config Schema
description: Add A2A config to schema.rs with peer array support and encryption. Effort: 1h

title: Task 3: A2A Channel Implementation
description: Implement Channel trait for A2AChannel with send/listen/health_check. Effort: 4h

title: Task 4: Gateway A2A Endpoints
description: Add /a2a/send, /a2a/stream/:session_id, /a2a/health endpoints to gateway. Effort: 3h

title: Task 5: A2A Message Processing
description: Create processor.rs to convert A2AMessage to ChannelMessage and integrate with agent loop. Effort: 2h

title: Task 6: Channel Factory Registration
description: Register A2AChannel in channels factory with config-based enablement. Effort: 30min

title: Write integration tests for Google A2A protocol
description: Create tests/a2a_google_integration.rs with tests for: AgentCard discovery, task creation, task status retrieval, task streaming, task cancellation, bearer token auth, and peer allowlist enforcement.

title: Remove pairing flow (not needed for static tokens)
description: Google A2A uses static bearer tokens, not dynamic pairing. Consider removing: src/channels/a2a/pairing.rs, pair-a2a and confirm-a2a CLI commands, and pairing endpoints in gateway. Decision needed: keep for backward compatibility or remove entirely.

title: A2A Protocol: Phase 3 - Testing & Documentation
description: Integration tests, documentation, and CLI commands for A2A protocol

title: Task 10: Integration Tests
description: Write end-to-end tests for A2A message flow, security, and resilience. Effort: 3h

title: Task 11: Documentation
description: Update channels-reference.md and create a2a-setup.md guide. Effort: 2h

title: Task 12: CLI Commands
description: Add CLI commands: pair-a2a, list-a2a-peers, test-a2a-peer, send-a2a. Effort: 1h

title: Wire A2A task creation to agent loop with SSE streaming
description: POST /tasks creates task but never dispatches to agent or stores it. Implement: task store in AppState, spawn background agent execution on task creation, SSE streaming via /tasks/{id}/stream, proper get/cancel handlers.
